inputs.label: F(s) Numerator Coefficient
inputs.businessContext: Coefficient of the numerator polynomial in F(s)

inputs.label: Numerator Order
inputs.businessContext: Order of the numerator polynomial (0 for constant)

inputs.label: Denominator Coefficients (comma-separated)
inputs.businessContext: Coefficients of denominator polynomial from highest to lowest order, e.g., 1,2,1 for s^2+2s+1

inputs.label: Time t (s)
inputs.businessContext: Time at which to evaluate the inverse Laplace transform

inputs.label: Natural Frequency ωn (rad/s)
inputs.businessContext: Undamped natural frequency for second-order systems

formulas.primary: if (denominator_order === 1) { return (F_s / denominator_coeffs) * Math.exp(-denominator_coeffs * time_value); } else if (denominator_order === 2) { let omega_n = natural_frequency; let zeta = damping_ratio; let omega_d = omega_n * Math.sqrt(1 - zeta * zeta); let numerator = F_s; let denominator = denominator_coeffs; return (numerator / denominator) * (1 - (Math.exp(-zeta * omega_n * time_value) / Math.sqrt(1 - zeta * zeta)) * Math.sin(omega_d * time_value + Math.acos(zeta))); } else { return 0; }
breakdown: if (denominator_order === 1) { let a = denominator_coeffs; let K = F_s; return K * Math.exp(-a * time_value); }

if (denominator_order === 2) { let omega_n = natural_frequency; let zeta = damping_ratio; let omega_d = omega_n * Math.sqrt(1 - zeta * zeta); let K = F_s; let denom = denominator_coeffs; let step_response = 1 - (Math.exp(-zeta * omega_n * time_value) / Math.sqrt(1 - zeta * zeta)) * Math.sin(omega_d * time_value + Math.acos(zeta)); return (K / denom) * step_response; }
